steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: Simplify: $$f(10) = 40 - 3 = 37.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. It's given that the function $f$ is defined by $f\left(x\right)=4x-3$. Substituting $10$ for $x$ in the given function yields $f\left(10\right)=4\left(10\right)-3$, which is equivalent to $f\left(10\right)=40-3$, or $f\left(10\right)=37$. Therefore, the value of $f\left(10\right)$ is $37$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $f\left(10\right)$ for the function $f\left(x\right)=4x$, not $f\left(x\right)=4x-3$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $f\left(10\right)$ for the function $f\left(x\right)=4x+3$, not $f\left(x\right)=4x-3$.
